creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Peter Eriksson from comment #12)
Hi Petern,

That's my point, in order to introduce such changes in our rsync, even
in as an option, I need to have confidence in the changes.

According to my experience, our better move would be to start pushing
your changes to the rsync project as a PR, where we can collectively start
reviewing your code.

From that point, even if your changes aren't merged immediately, I can
start introducing this feature as an experimental feature, expanding the
user base for testing.

I may seem a little shy, but rsync is a key part of our infrastructure
I don't wanna introduce breaking changes without proper reviewing and testing.

Thanks
-- rodrigo
